mapper.update:
update fault_handling
user_id = #{userId},
resources_id = #{resourcesId},
fault_description = #{faultDescription},
`status` = #{status},
update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select id, user_id, resources_id, fault_description, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from fault_handling where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into fault_handling(id,user_id, resources_id, fault_description, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id},#{userId}, #{resourcesId}, #{faultDescription}, #{status}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into fault_handling(id,user_id, resources_id, fault_description, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.resourcesId}, #{entity.faultDescription}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into fault_handling(id,user_id, resources_id, fault_description, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.resourcesId}, #{entity.faultDescription}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id), resources_id = values(resources_id), fault_description = values(fault_description), status = values(status), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
